'''Homuhr''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] who worked on [[the Rig]] in the [[Stenness Node]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
During the [[Mission to the Rig|infiltration]] of the Rig by [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] seeking to bring down the [[Crimson Nova]], [[Saesee Tiin/Legends|Saesee Tiin]] arrived aboard in the guise of a [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]], and was greeted by Homuhr. He told Tiin he would look at his stock and offer him a price. The Jedi later detonated an explosive planted aboard his ship, which destroyed a large portion of the hangar bay. It is unknown if Homuhr was caught in the blast.<ref name="SoF" />

==Behind the scenes==
"Homuhr" is taken from the [[Aurebesh/Legends|Aurebesh]] tag on the Aqualish's overalls, which is presumably his name.

==Appearances==
*[[Republic 65|''Republic'' 65]] {{1st}}
